sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi svoje lične podatke prilikom korištenja interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: الْأَمْنُ السِّيبِرَانِيُّ يَمْنَعُ السَّرِقَةَ الرَّقْمِيَّةَ وَالْهَجَمَاتِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Cyber sigurnost sprječava digitalnu krađu i elektronske napade.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity prevents digital theft and electronic attacks.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ اسْتِخْدَامُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ وَسِرِّيَّةٍ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je uvijek koristiti jake i tajne lozinke.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to always use strong and secret passwords.
